content: Am i tweaking or is this genuinly insane

the best option is using slow deck

uh no, just use any unit that can inflict slow and you are good
the main goal is to use slow at the right time
i mean that's what you should do all the time, use the right skill at the right time
something like... tinct is enough to inflict slow on jenkins
but that's just stopping jenkins only by 1 turn
so yeah... on top of it, you need to figure out on what to do next when you don't have slow anymore
every time someone attacks they take 6 dmg?
When you apply the wheel and kill someone with the wheel, you apply the daf debuff where they take dmg when they play a card, targeting the lowest hp enemy first
so i equip it and at end of any my turn the opponent lowest hp gets 6 stacks
and if i get a kill it gives another 6 stacks
Only on equip and on kill
it says end of turn tho
Yeah it's every end of turn
And when you get a kill
I mean it's pretty good, especially on pandia or smth

it really screws with jenkins comps which is exactly what i want rn

ogier gdoll faros has some insane snipe potential wow
